title: CUE: Report a Suspected Workplace Violation (Underground Economy Tip Line)
description: MA Council on the Underground Economy (CUE) page for anonymous tips about businesses concealing or misrepresenting information to avoid employer responsibilities — wages, taxes, labor laws, insurance, licensing, safety. CUE coordinates cross-agency enforcement on wage theft, misclassification, prevailing-wage violations, tax evasion, cash-wage fraud, child labor, and safety. Tips submitted via a six-step online form and may be shared with other agencies and law enforcement.

source.publisher: Massachusetts Council on the Underground Economy (CUE)

notes: CUE does not represent individuals or give legal advice; submissions may be anonymous. Tip line (877) 96-LABOR (52267); email CUETIPS@Mass.gov. A cross-agency referral mechanism, not a direct enforcement body — relevant for DDS members aware of employer-side violations.
